name: finance-os
description: Personal finance app: FastAPI backend, Vite + React frontend, SQLite storage. Designed to run locally via Docker Compose or Forger.
author: FinanceOS

changelog.summary: Mejoras de experiencia local, agente y empaquetado para Finance OS.
changes: Normaliza el nombre visible de la app como Finance OS.
Mejora la documentacion operacional para agentes.
Refuerza el empaquetado para distribuir la app sin metadata Git interna.

catalog.short_description: Personal finance tracker with AI assistant. Your data, your machine.
catalog.description: Finance OS is a local-first personal finance app. Track income and expenses, categorize movements, import bank statements, and ask the built-in AI assistant questions about your finances — all without sending your data anywhere.

scripts.init_db: cd backend && uv run python scripts/init_db.py
scripts.seed: cd backend && uv run python scripts/seed.py
scripts.list_categories: cd backend && uv run python scripts/list_categories.py
scripts.list_movements: cd backend && uv run python scripts/list_movements.py
scripts.import_movements: cd backend && uv run python scripts/import_movements.py
scripts.upsert_categories: cd backend && uv run python scripts/upsert_categories.py
scripts.edit_movement: cd backend && uv run python scripts/edit_movement.py
scripts.delete_movement: cd backend && uv run python scripts/delete_movement.py
scripts.verify: cd backend && uv run python scripts/verify.py
